schedule.description: Game recap — Cubs 10, Pirates 4; 10-game skid over
Bold take — Two win streaks plus losing streak, MLB first
NL Central — Brewers 4 GB, Milwaukee running
Game preview — Rea vs. Skenes, 5:40 PM CT tonight
Happ feature — 40 straight games reaching base at PNC
Pre-game hype — series finale, use the momentum

stories.title: Cubs 10, Pirates 4 — 10-Game Losing Streak Over
stories.angle: Ian Happ 5 RBI (tiebreaking 3-run HR + 2-run single); Conforto 2-run PH HR; Cubs end 10-game skid (longest since 2022) in 10-4 blowout; first win since May 15; Cubs 30-26

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Ian Happ came HOME and delivered.

The Pittsburgh kid hit a tiebreaking 3-run HR, drove in FIVE runs, and helped the Cubs end their 10-game losing streak in a 10-4 rout of the Pirates.

Conforto added a pinch-hit 2-run shot. Cubs are 30-26.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Historic Cubs Season — Two Win Streaks Plus a 10-Game Skid (MLB First)
stories.angle: With the 10-game losing streak complete, 2026 Cubs join 2017 Dodgers as only two teams in AL/NL history with two separate 10-game winning streaks AND a 10-game losing streak in the same season

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
Two 10-game win streaks. One 10-game skid. All in the same season.

The 2026 Cubs just joined the 2017 Dodgers as the ONLY teams in MLB history to pull that off.

That's this team. Maddening, electric, and completely unlike anything else.

#Cubs #ChicagoCubs #MLB

stories.title: NL Central Watch — Brewers 4 GB, Milwaukee Is Running
stories.angle: Brewers swept Cardinals 3-0, won 14 of last 18, now 32-20 and 4.0 GB ahead of Cubs (30-26); Cubs need sustained run in June; Brewers building a cushion

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
Milwaukee just swept the Cardinals and is 14-4 in their last 18.

The Brewers are 4 games up on the Cubs in the NL Central — and they're RUNNING. One win after a 10-game skid isn't enough. The Cubs need a sustained run, and they need it now.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Series Finale Tonight — Rea vs. Skenes at PNC Park, 5:40 PM CT
stories.angle: Colin Rea (4-3, 4.83 ERA) vs Paul Skenes (6-4, 3.00 ERA, 65 K) in series finale; win = series split; loss = Cubs take 1 of 4; Skenes among NL's most dominant starters

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
Paul Skenes stands between the Cubs and a series split tonight.

The Pirates ace has a 3.00 ERA and 65 Ks on the season. Colin Rea (4-3, 4.83 ERA) gets the ball at PNC Park — 5:40 PM CT on Marquee.

One win doesn't end anything. The Cubs need TWO.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Ian Happ's Pittsburgh Magic — 40 Straight Games Reaching Base at PNC
stories.angle: Happ (Mt. Lebanon native) has reached base in 40 consecutive games at PNC Park — longest active streak for any MLB hitter at a single park; 5 RBI last night to end the skid in his hometown

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
Ian Happ grew up minutes from PNC Park and has been PUNISHING it his whole career.

40 straight games reaching base at PNC. The longest active streak for any MLB hitter at one park. Five RBI last night to end a 10-game skid.

His city. His stage.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — Use the Momentum Tonight
stories.angle: Pre-game frame for series finale; Cubs coming off emotional 10-4 win; Rea vs Skenes is a test; first pitch 5:40 PM CT PNC Park

x_posts.label: Post 6A
x_posts.text:
Rea vs. Skenes. PNC Park. First pitch 5:40 PM CT.

The Cubs ended a 10-GAME SKID last night with a 10-4 rout. Tonight they can earn a series split against Paul Skenes and a Pirates team that's been gritty all month.

The momentum is there. Use it.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
